tags.name: Feed
tags.description: Load and refresh the home feed

tags.name: Posts
tags.description: Create, publish, edit, and manage posts

tags.name: Friend Suggestions
tags.description: Suggest, follow, dismiss, and list friend recommendations

post.description:
Upload a single image or video file to the server.
Returns a `media_id` to reference when creating a post.

For carousel posts, call this endpoint once per file (2–10 times)
and collect all `media_id` values before creating the post.

file.description: The image or video file to upload.

media_type.description: Type of the file being uploaded.

error.message: File size 12 MB exceeds the 8 MB limit for IMAGE uploads.
Format 'image/gif' is not supported. Use JPEG or PNG for images.

post.description:
Apply edits to a previously uploaded media file before creating a post.
Returns a new `media_id` pointing to the processed file.

adjustments.description: Pixel-level adjustments. All values range from -100 to 100, default 0.

filter.description: Preset filter to apply. Set to `NONE` to remove filter.

post.description: Create a new post using one or more uploaded `media_id` values.

media_ids.description: Ordered list of `media_id` values from the upload step.

status.description: `PUBLISHED` to post immediately. `DRAFT` to save without publishing.

disable_comments.description: Prevent other users from commenting on this post.

422.description: Media not found or not yet processed.

error.message: Media 'med_9vWz5pNm6C' is still processing. Please try again shortly.

patch.description: Update editable fields of a published or draft post.

location.description: Tag a location. Set to `null` to remove existing location.

location_id.description: ID from the locations search endpoint.

user_tags.description:
Tag users in the post image.
Replaces the full existing list — send an empty array `[]` to remove all tags.

position.description: Normalized position on the image (0.0–1.0). Only applies to IMAGE posts.

422.description: Referenced user or location not found.

post.description:
Toggles a like on the post. If not liked, it likes the post.
If already liked, it removes the like.
Returns updated like_count and is_liked so the frontend can
update the feed UI locally without reloading the feed.

is_liked.description: true if the post is now liked, false if like was removed.

get.summary: Get users who liked a post

post.description:
Toggles a repost on the post. If not reposted, it reposts to the
logged-in user's followers. If already reposted, it removes the repost.
Returns updated repost_count and is_reposted so the frontend can
update the feed UI locally without reloading the feed.

caption.description: Optional caption. Ignored when removing a repost.
caption.example: Had to share this amazing shot!

is_reposted.description: true if now reposted, false if repost was removed.

error.message: You cannot repost your own post.

post.summary: Add a comment to a post

403.description: Comments are disabled for this post.

error.message: Comments are disabled for this post.

post.description:
Posts a reply to an existing comment. Replies are nested one level deep.
The original commenter is notified.

text.example: @jane_doe That means a lot, thank you!

403.description: Comments are disabled for this post.

error.message: Comments are disabled for this post.

get.summary: Get full paginated list of friend suggestions

error.message: Access token is missing or invalid.

Forbidden.description: You do not have permission to perform this action.

error.message: You can only edit your own posts.
